response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience and 5 years of large-scale infrastructure/cloud compute platform expertise; their work is primarily in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang with minimal evidence of cloud compute leadership, distributed systems design, or mentoring in cloud/DevOps contexts, making them a poor fit for the role’s core technical and leadership requirements.
strengths: Strong full-stack versatility across languages and domains
Proven open-source contributions and technical mentoring via workshops
Experience with scalable systems and CI/CD infrastructure
concerns: Only 1-2 years of C++ exposure, far below the 8-year minimum requirement
No demonstrable experience with cloud compute platforms or distributed systems at scale
Lacks documented technical leadership in cloud/DevOps engineering teams
